calendar.matters:
RECOGNITION OF CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for petition for gender, sex identifier, and for name change.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:29:06 a.m. and concluding at 09:33:38 a.m.

Petitioner Christopher Paxton appearing represented by Sunney Rae Darling, Esq. and is placed under oath via Zoom Video Conference.

Court has reviewed the papers in this case.
Court finds that notice was given as required, to the Kansas Sheriff's Department on Jan-27-2023 as it relates to four open cases.

Petition for Gender, Sex Identifier, and for Name Change is GRANTED.
Petitioner's name is changed from CHRISTOPHER DAVID PAXTON, a Male to CHARLOTTE CHARDAY DELLAROSE, a Female.
